subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Quote accurately from a text when explaining what the text says explicitly and when drawing inferences and/or making generalizations from the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Determine a theme of a story, drama, or poem from details in the text, including how characters in a story or drama respond to challenges or how the speaker in a poem reflects upon a topic; summarize the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Compare and contrast two or more characters, settings, or events in a story, drama, or poem, drawing on specific details in the text (e.g., how characters interact).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in literature.
eligibleContentText: Describe how a narrator's or speaker's point of view influences how events are described; describe an author's purpose and explain how it is conveyed in the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among texts.
eligibleContentText: Compare and contrast stories in the same genre on their approaches to similar themes and topics.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in literature.
eligibleContentText: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown and multiple-meaning words and phrases based on grade 5 reading and content, choosing flexibly from a range of strategies (context clues such as cause/effect and comparisons; common Greek and Latin affixes and roots).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in literature.
eligibleContentText: Demonstrate understanding of figurative language, word relationships, and nuances in word meanings (simile, metaphor, personification; idioms, adages, and proverbs; synonyms, antonyms, homographs).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Quote accurately from a text when explaining what the text says explicitly and when drawing inferences and/or making generalizations from the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Determine two or more main ideas of a text and explain how they are supported by key details; summarize the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Explain the relationships or interactions between two or more individuals, events, ideas, steps, or concepts in a historical, scientific, or technical text based on specific information in the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Analyze multiple accounts of the same event or topic, noting important similarities and differences in the point of view they represent.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Compare and contrast the overall structure (e.g., chronology, comparison, cause/effect, problem/solution) of events, ideas, concepts, or information and text features in two or more texts.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Explain how an author uses reasons and evidence to support particular points in a text, identifying which reasons and evidence support which point(s).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Integrate information from several texts on the same topic in order to demonstrate subject knowledge.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Interpret text features (e.g., headings, graphics, charts) and/or make connections between text and the content of text features.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 5 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in informational texts.

anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in informational texts.
